description: Create a Prospective Memory (PM) experiment in PsychoPy Builder that combines an ongoing Lexical Decision Task with a PM task. Using the source data at /home/ga/Documents/lexical_source.csv, generate a 20-trial conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/pm_conditions.csv containing 'stimulus', 'border_color', and 'correct_key' columns. The logic requires approximately 18 'Ongoing' trials (gray border, 'f' or 'j' keys) and 2 'PM Target' trials (blue border, 'space' key). The final experiment, saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/prospective_memory.psyexp, must feature a routine and loop incorporating Polygon, Text, and Keyboard components that update based on the conditions file variables.
